description: Copy and integrate external skills (Ralph and UI/UX) into the knowledge/skills/ directory, and register all existing skills. Ralph gets copied from /projects/sandbox/ralph-source/skills/. UI/UX skills get copied from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/ with symlinks resolved (actual files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/src/ui-ux-pro-max/ copied instead of symlinks). All existing repo skills get registered in knowledge/skills/_index.yaml.
steps: Create knowledge/skills/ralph/ directory and copy: /projects/sandbox/ralph-source/skills/ralph/SKILL.md to knowledge/skills/ralph/SKILL.md.
Create knowledge/skills/prd/ directory and copy: /projects/sandbox/ralph-source/skills/prd/SKILL.md to knowledge/skills/prd/SKILL.md.

Create knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/ directory. Copy /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md to knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md. Copy the ACTUAL data directory from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/src/ui-ux-pro-max/data/ (not the symlink) to knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/data/. Copy the ACTUAL scripts directory from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/src/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/ (not the symlink) to knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/.

Create knowledge/skills/ui-styling/ directory. Copy all files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/ui-styling/ to knowledge/skills/ui-styling/ (SKILL.md, LICENSE.txt, canvas-fonts/, references/, scripts/).

Create knowledge/skills/design-system/ directory. Copy all files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/design-system/ to knowledge/skills/design-system/ (SKILL.md, data/, references/, scripts/, templates/).
Create knowledge/skills/design/ directory. Copy all files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/design/ to knowledge/skills/design/ (SKILL.md, data/, references/, scripts/).
Create knowledge/skills/brand/ directory. Copy all files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/brand/ to knowledge/skills/brand/ (SKILL.md, references/, scripts/, templates/).
Create knowledge/skills/banner-design/ directory. Copy all files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/banner-design/ to knowledge/skills/banner-design/ (SKILL.md, references/).
Create knowledge/skills/slides/ directory. Copy all files from /projects/sandbox/ui-ux-source/.claude/skills/slides/ to knowledge/skills/slides/ (SKILL.md, references/).

Update knowledge/skills/_index.yaml to register ALL skills - both the newly copied ones and the existing repo skills (grill-me, grill-with-docs, handoff, diagnose, improve-codebase-architecture, prototype, tdd, to-issues, to-prd, triage, web-scraper, write-a-skill, zoom-out, caveman, ai-product, ai-code-guidance, setup-matt-pocock-skills, xhs_collector). Each entry: {name, path (relative from repo root), description (from SKILL.md frontmatter or first paragraph), tags, composable_with (list of compatible skills)}.

Define the skill usage flow in knowledge/skills/_index.yaml metadata section: idea-fuzzy -> grill-me/grill-with-docs -> prd/to-prd -> to-issues -> ralph/tdd -> diagnose -> improve-codebase-architecture -> handoff. Plus UI/UX skills for design work.
Verify no symlinks exist in knowledge/skills/ - all files should be real copies. Run: find knowledge/skills/ -type l (should return nothing).
acceptance_criteria: knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md exists, knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/data/ contains CSV files (not a symlink), knowledge/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/ contains .py files (not a symlink)
knowledge/skills/ui-styling/SKILL.md exists with canvas-fonts/, references/, scripts/
knowledge/skills/design-system/SKILL.md exists with data/, references/, scripts/, templates/
knowledge/skills/design/SKILL.md exists with data/, references/, scripts/
knowledge/skills/brand/SKILL.md exists with references/, scripts/, templates/
knowledge/skills/_index.yaml lists all 26+ skills with proper metadata
find knowledge/skills/ -type l returns no results (no symlinks)
Existing skills at repo root (grill-me/, diagnose/, etc.) are NOT modified
findings: All 9 external skills copied successfully. ui-ux-pro-max symlinks resolved correctly (14 CSV files in data/, 3 .py files in scripts/). No symlinks remain in knowledge/skills/. 27 total skills registered in _index.yaml across 6 workflow phases. All 152 tests pass with 93% coverage.
